grants.name: Federal Volunteer Grants 2025–26
grants.notes: ⚠️ 10 DAYS LEFT. EOIs through local Federal MP. $66,665 per electorate. Must have 40%+ volunteer workforce. Both orgs are volunteer-driven — strong fit.

grants.name: Local Sporting Champions (Round 4)
grants.notes: For individual coaches, officials and competitors aged 12–18 attending championships. Could support SuperNova U18 players.

grants.name: Whittlesea Community Grants 2025-26
grants.notes: NEW — North. All year round grants open until 30 April 2026. Strong multicultural community (South Morang, Mernda, Epping, Mill Park). Also has Female Inclusion in Sport Grants (co-funded with DPV Health). Contact community.grants@whittlesea.vic.gov.au or 9217 2170.

grants.name: Whitehorse Community Grants 2026
grants.notes: Eastern suburbs. Mitcham Badminton is in Whitehorse — clean venue fit for SuperNova Learn & Play. Also Partnership Grants up to $40K/yr for 4 years. Contact grants@whitehorse.vic.gov.au.

grants.name: Darebin Community Grants 2026-27
grants.notes: NEW — North. Closes 4 May 2026. Covers Preston, Reservoir, Northcote. Priority groups include CALD, women, young people. Must deliver within Darebin. Contact Darebingrants@darebin.vic.gov.au.

grants.name: City of Melbourne Connected Neighbourhoods
grants.notes: Monthly assessment rounds. Only relevant if TVS delivers programs within City of Melbourne boundaries.

grants.name: City of Melbourne — Town Halls Scheme (CUTHS)
categories: Free venue use for NFP events
grants.notes: In-kind support for NFP organisations to use Melbourne Town Halls at no cost.

grants.name: Wyndham Medium Grants – Round 2
grants.notes: Strongest council opportunity — both orgs are Wyndham-based. Co-contribution required (volunteer hours at $45/hr count). Priority: women, CALD communities.

grants.name: Wyndham Small Grants
grants.notes: Rolling applications. Quick wins for equipment or small program costs. Both orgs Wyndham-based.

grants.name: Hume Sports Aid Grants — Pathway (Batch 2)
grants.notes: NEW — North. For Hume residents aged 24 and under. Financial support for representative competition. Could support SuperNova U18 players who live in Hume. Closes 30 June 2026.

grants.name: Merri-bek Community Participation Grants (Groups)
grants.notes: NEW — North. Rolling quick-response funding for participation projects. Covers Brunswick, Coburg, Fawkner. Must benefit Merri-bek residents. Contact communitygrants@merri-bek.vic.gov.au.

closedGrants.name: Victorian Sporting Club Grants (Round 2)
closedGrants.reason: Closed 7 April 2026. All categories reopen in 2026-27 Round 1 (~Oct 2026).

closedGrants.name: Maroondah Annual Community Grants 2026/27
closedGrants.reason: Closed 2 April 2026. Up to $10K. Outcomes mid-July 2026. Enquiry sent to Josh Burt re: outside-council venue.

closedGrants.name: Darebin Older and Active Community Grant 2026-27
Hume Annual Community Grants 2026 (Round 2)
closedGrants.reason: Round 2 applications closed. 92 recipients shared $352K. Watch for 2027 round.

closedGrants.name: Merri-bek Annual Grants 2026-27
closedGrants.reason: Closed 28 February 2026. Community Strengthening (up to $7K), Facility Improvement, Organisational Establishment (up to $10K/yr for 3 yrs). Next round ~Jan 2027.

closedGrants.name: Hobsons Bay Make it Happen Grants
closedGrants.reason: Closed 30 March 2026. Up to $25K. Next round ~Feb 2027.

closedGrants.name: Melton Community Grants 2025/26
closedGrants.reason: Closed 31 March 2026. Up to $5K. Watch for 2026/27.

closedGrants.name: Knox Leisure Minor Capital Works Grant
closedGrants.reason: Closed 15 March 2026. Opens 1 Feb each year.

closedGrants.name: City of Melbourne Community Inclusion Grants 2026-27
City of Melbourne Community Events Grants 2026-27
Change Our Game Community Activation Grants 2024-25
closedGrants.reason: Closed. Up to $10K for women in sport. Watch for 2025-26 round.

closedGrants.name: Sport & Rec Vic Significant Sporting Events

upcomingGrants.name: City of Melbourne Annual Arts Grants 2027
upcomingGrants.note: Arts projects in City of Melbourne.

upcomingGrants.name: Knox Community Development Fund 2026-27
upcomingGrants.note: Eastern suburbs — ACM Bayswater is in Knox. Sport/leisure, multicultural, community strengthening. Strong fit for SuperNova eastern expansion.

upcomingGrants.name: Hume Community Grants 2027
upcomingGrants.note: North. Broadmeadows, Craigieburn, Sunbury. Strong multicultural community. Operational grants ($1.5K), Community Strengthening ($7K), 3-year grants ($10K/yr). Previously funded multicultural events and women's sport.

upcomingGrants.name: Whittlesea Female Inclusion in Sport Grants
upcomingGrants.note: North. Co-funded with DPV Health. Specifically for women's sport participation. Excellent fit for SuperNova Learn & Play — Women Only.

upcomingGrants.name: Merri-bek Annual Grants 2027-28
upcomingGrants.note: North. Brunswick, Coburg, Fawkner. Priority: migrants, refugees, women, CALD communities.

upcomingGrants.name: Change Our Game Community Activation Grants 2025-26
upcomingGrants.note: Perfect for SuperNova Women's Learn & Play. 3 streams: Participation, Education, Community Leaders.

upcomingGrants.name: Multicultural Festivals & Events Program 2025-26
upcomingGrants.note: Strong fit for TVS multicultural events (Holi, Diwali).

upcomingGrants.name: Wyndham Active Revitalisation Program
upcomingGrants.note: $3.75M program. Requires lease/licence at Council facility.

upcomingGrants.name: Sporting Club Grants Program 2026-27 (Round 1)
upcomingGrants.note: All 5 categories available again for SuperNova.
